scripts.deploy:base: graph build subgraph.base.yaml && graph deploy bio-verify-base subgraph.base.yaml --ipfs https://api.studio.thegraph.com/ipfs/ --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --version-label v0.0.1
scripts.deploy:eth: graph build subgraph.eth.yaml && graph deploy bio-verify-eth subgraph.eth.yaml --ipfs https://api.studio.thegraph.com/ipfs/ --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ --version-label v0.0.1
